summary: Archived native accessibility matrix evidence from earlier QA automation. Active preview review now uses smoke-test checks plus targeted screen-reader notes.
archiveNote: Kept only as historical context. This file is not an H5/H6 blocker and must not be turned into an owner row-by-row task.

completedEntries.notes: Automated summary/data-table helpers and showcase data-details coverage passed. Current screen-reader status is summarized in owner smoke notes and release claims.

Representative iOS VoiceOver-target and Android TalkBack-target screenshots/logs were captured for historical matrix rows. Active release notes summarize remaining assistive-technology risk instead of requiring matrix completion.

requiredAssistiveTech.build: Expo showcase or native release app
Expo showcase or native release app

historicalGaps: No longer tracked as required matrix rows. See smoke-test-checks.md and h6-release-claims.md for current release risk.
